untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'yearly high' and 'breakout within a third of yearly high' which cannot be expressed with provided indicators. Donchian channels (dc_upper) used as proxy for recent highs, but yearly high detection and third-of-range breakout logic are not translatable without custom lookback functions or explicit yearly high input.
translation_notes: Eve peak pattern is context-dependent and pattern-recognition based. Translated as: SHORT entry when price breaks below the upper Donchian (recent high proxy) while in confirmed downtrend. Exit when price crosses back above upper Donchian. This is an approximation; ideally requires yearly high calculation and specific range division logic not available in standard indicators.
